channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: sombr Announces Dates For 2026 North American You Are the Reason Fall Arena Tour
item.description:
[Intro music plays]
Host: "Hey there, music fans. Welcome to our latest update. We've got some exciting news for you today. sombr, the 20-year-old 'Homewrecker' singer, is hitting the road for a massive 37-date fall North American arena tour. The tour, called 'You Are the Reason,' will feature support from some amazing artists, including Interpol, King Princess, and Tom Odell, among others.
[Soft music plays in the background]
Host: "The tour kicks off in Mexico City on July 22, and then makes its way to the US and Canada, with stops in cities like Vancouver, Seattle, Los Angeles, Houston, and many more. The final show will be at New York's legendary Madison Square Garden on November 23.
[Short music transition]
Host: "If you're looking to get tickets, there are a few opportunities. An artist presale starts tomorrow, April 14, at 10 am local time. A Spotify presale follows on Thursday, April 16, also at 10 am local time. And finally, general tickets go on sale on Friday, April 17, at 10 am local time.
[Soft music continues]
Host: "And if that's not enough, sombr is also releasing a brand new single, 'Potential,' on Thursday, April 16. This is the follow-up to his hit song 'Homewrecker,' which peaked at number 24 on the Billboard Hot 100 in February.
[Outro music plays]
Host: "That's all for now. Make sure to check out sombr's tour dates and get your tickets soon. And don't forget to listen to his new single, 'Potential,' coming out this Thursday. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll see you next time."
